topic: Microchimerism: why your mother's cells stay in you forever
caption: Did you know your mom's cells are still inside you? 🤯 Microchimerism is the phenomenon where a mother's cells remain in her child's body for life. 💡 This can happen during pregnancy when cells are exchanged through the placenta. 🌟 Research shows that these cells can even help repair damaged tissues. 💻 But what does this mean for our understanding of health and disease? 🤔 Save this so you don't lose it. Tag a friend who needs to see this. Follow @healthrecode for daily science-backed health. Don't forget — your future body will thank you. #Microchimerism #CellularBiology #Pregnancy #Health #Science
